commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A focused automated repair can update one workflow guard and the matching workflow test without choosing product direction.; Needs attention: The diff touches package publish provenance, and the current workflow guard can produce mixed source attribution for prebuilt artifact publishes.; Review finding: [P2] Validate source_ref with the rest of source attribution — .github/workflows/package-publish.yml:455-464 (sha=26bd2aa55a76251668f3a54628a4cd23ca6e12f7)
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates the package publish reusable workflow for prebuilt artifact source attribution, moves package inspector email rendering into the shared Convex email module, removes the old unused frontend email template, and adds focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. From source inspection, setting PREBUILT_PACKAGE_ARTIFACT_PATH with INPUT_SOURCE_REF but no source_repo/source_commit enters the new defaulting path and preserves the explicit ref, which can be checked in the Resolve publish command logic without running the workflow.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can update one workflow guard and the matching workflow test without choosing product direction.
